LeakGuard synthetic enterprise metadata file-upload QA payload.
Use this as source text for generated local upload files. All values are fake examples.

AZURE_RG=rg-prod-weu-files-001
AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT=stdeberfileprd1234567
tenantId=99999999-8888-7777-6666-555555555555
subscriptionId=11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555

AWS_ARN=arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/LeakGuardQaRole
AWS account id: 210987654321

GCP project_id: lg-prod-project-123
OTC resource otc-prod-de-ecs-001
OpenStack project_id=aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

Kubernetes namespace: prod-payments
Kubernetes resource secret/db-password

Private IP 10.10.20.30
Private CIDR 10.10.20.0/24
UNC \\fs-prod-weu-01\FSA1234567
SPN cifs/stdeberfileprd1234567.file.core.windows.net
LDAP CN=svc-backup-prod,OU=Service Accounts,OU=SH070,DC=corp,DC=local
Azure Files share FSA1234567
AD group AD123-SH070-FILE-L-STFSA1234567R
host fs-prod-weu-01.corp.local
user CORP\adm-test.user
EMAIL=test.user@example.com
